phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the pharmacy counter
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está el mostrador?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh DOHN-deh es-TAH ehl mohs-trah-DOHR?

likely_response.local: Justo al entrar, frente a la puerta.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR FREHN-teh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah
likely_response.translation_en: Right upon entering, opposite the door.

responses.english: Right upon entering, opposite the door.
responses.phonetic: HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR FREHN-teh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah
responses.french: Justo al entrar, frente a la puerta.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the consultation area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo hablar en privado con el farmacéutico?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh ah-BLAHR en pree-BAH-doh kohn el far-mah-seh-OO-tee-koh?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, detrás de la puerta cerrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHTRÁS DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah thehr-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, where can I speak privately with the pharmacist?

responses.english: Good morning, where can I speak privately with the pharmacist?
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHTRÁS DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah thehr-RAH-dah
responses.french: Al fondo, detrás de la puerta cerrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this medication is available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen este medicamento en stock ahora?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, TYEH-nehn ES-teh meh-dee-kah-MEN-toh en STOHK ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.local: Déjeme comprobarlo un momento, por favor.
likely_response.pronunciation: DÉ-heh-meh kohmp-roh-BAHR-loh OON moh-MEHN-toh POHR fah-BOHR
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, do you have this medication in stock now?

responses.english: Good morning, do you have this medication in stock now?
responses.phonetic: DÉ-heh-meh kohmp-roh-BAHR-loh OON moh-MEHN-toh POHR fah-BOHR
responses.french: Déjeme comprobarlo un momento, por favor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to explain headache symptoms to the pharmacist
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo le describo los síntomas de mi dolor de cabeza?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh leh dehs-kree-BOH lohs SEEN-toh-mahs deh mee doh-LOHR deh kah-BEH-sah

likely_response.local: Explique cuándo empezó el dolor y qué medicamentos toma actualmente.
likely_response.pronunciation: ehksp-lee-K-eh KOOÁN-doh ehm-peh-THÓ EHL doh-LOHR Y k-É meh-dee-kah-MEHN-tohs TOH-mah ahth-too-ahl-MEHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Explain when the pain started and what medications you currently take.

responses.english: Explain when the pain started and what medications you currently take.
responses.phonetic: ehksp-lee-K-eh KOOÁN-doh ehm-peh-THÓ EHL doh-LOHR Y k-É meh-dee-kah-MEHN-tohs TOH-mah ahth-too-ahl-MEHN-teh
responses.french: Explique cuándo empezó el dolor y qué medicamentos toma actualmente.
